calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-01-2006 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: APPEARENCE BY TELEPHONE, THOMAS A. COLLINS.
AS A RULE SAN MATEO TREASURER REQUEST A ORDER TO DISTRIBUTE FUNDS. COURT STATES THAT THESE FUNDS ARE NOT UNCLAIMED ASSETS. ATTORNEY DID NOT ASK SAN MATEO TREASURER IF THEY NEEDED A ORDER. COURT CAN NOT ORDER TREASURER TO RELEASE FUNDS. PERSONAL REPRESENTATIVE FEE TO COME OUT OF GLOBAL 1/3 SHARE. MR. COLLINS TO SUBMIT ORDER STATING TERMS OF DISTRIBUTION AND REQUESTING THE PERSONAL REPRESENTATIVE GET FUDS FROM THE SAN MATEO TREASURER. BOND WAIVED
COMM: DOROTHY MCMATH;CLERK:LARRISA DOTSON; RPTR. CHRISTINA PAXTON
